headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: An editorial market brief for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents and computer‑use assistants. This page synthesizes late‑June reporting on Gemini’s computer use, Grok’s rapid iteration, Siri’s platform refresh, and broader demand signals — then contrasts them with Super’s focus on durable computer‑operating agents and a reusable computer-use cache for repeated workflows.
